themes.label: App Crashes on Startup
themes.description: Users report the app crashing immediately upon opening after the recent update.

themes.label: Slow Portfolio Sync
themes.description: Mutual fund and stock portfolios take too long to refresh or fail to sync.

themes.label: Confusing UI for SIPs
themes.description: The new interface for setting up systematic investment plans is unintuitive.

themes.label: Customer Support Delays
themes.description: Long wait times connecting to agent.

quotes.text: Ever since the new update dropped yesterday, I can't even open the app. It just shows the logo and closes immediately.
Using an S23 Ultra and the app crashes every single time I try to log in with fingerprint.
Please fix the crashing bug! I need to check my investments but the app just white screens.
My CDSL mutual fund data hasn't updated in 3 days. Hit refresh 10 times and still showing old NAVs.
Syncing is completely broken right now. It just spins forever when I click on the US Stocks tab.
Portfolio takes a solid 2 minutes to load on 5G. This is unacceptable for a finance app.
Why did you guys change the SIP screen? I can't find where to pause my HDFC SIP anymore.
The old design was much better. Now there are too many menus just to start a simple monthly investment.
I ended up creating two SIPs by mistake because the confirmation button wasn't clear.

pulse.summary_note: Over the past analysis window, the dominant issue raised by users is consistent app crashing on startup following the most recent update, heavily affecting users across multiple Android device models including flagships. Furthermore, portfolio syncing is severely degraded, with users reporting long load times or complete failures when attempting to refresh mutual fund and US stock data. Finally, the recent redesign of the SIP setup flow has introduced significant friction, leading to user confusion and accidental duplicate investments due to an unintuitive interface.

action_items.title: Immediate Hotfix for Startup Crashes
action_items.description: Investigate and patch the null pointer exception occurring during the biometric login sequence introduced in v4.5.2.

action_items.title: Optimize Portfolio Sync Endpoint
action_items.description: Implement aggressive caching or background syncing for the CDSL and US partner broker endpoints to reduce the perceived load times from 2+ minutes to under 5 seconds.

action_items.title: Revert or Revise SIP UI Flow
action_items.description: Conduct rapid A/B testing on the SIP confirmation screen to address the accidental duplication issue, and add a clearly visible "Manage/Pause SIPs" button to the home screen.

pulse.footer: Report generated on 11 Mar 2026 16:30 for playstore
